title: WhoIsThePotato?
description: Shows your own player nametag (label) in the Inventory and Third Person View
body:
# Intro
This is an unofficial 1.16.5+ (Neo)Forge port of [Who am I?](https://modrinth.com/mod/whoami), the feature is the same as it but works with FML.

This mod will show your own player nametag (label) in the Inventory and Third Person View.

## Misc
[![image](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/75401fe6-76e7-471c-89e5-1edd37a950ad.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/kasualix)
